history.text: When I spoke in Hindi, it typed in English and that to anything else.
When the speaker lists items, they are formatted as a bullet list.

Apply and reload engine button and save audio settings does not have any background which makes it differently identified that user have to save it. It looks more like a background text. So give the button a proper makeover so that user is able to identify and place them at the bottom instead of just there.
Second thing tell me that how the fix and learn will work. Because I have no idea how to test it.
Let the system listen to the active odd case when changing and then put it in there rather than letting the user type it in.
In the floating pill, if it is listening and showing animation, I don't want to see text in that place. So, keep it as listening UI only or just the text, not both as it looks ugly overall.
Maximize button does not work. It is still keeping the same size.
All dropdowns are transparent, so it is like making no sense, I cannot see anything.
It can be deleted or deleted or deleted a new delivery code.
